authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.40(b)(87) — San Francisquito Creek and tributaries (Santa Clara and San Mateo Cos.)
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams layer record for gaz_id 232397, "San Francisquito Creek", Stream, Santa Clara/San Mateo Cos., CA
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":232397,"gaz_name":"San Francisquito Creek","gaz_featureclass":"Stream","fcode":46000,"state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"Santa Clara/San Mateo","objectid_1":1383576}; geometry multipoint, first point (Web Mercator -13593807.9306, 4504269.4270) converts to lon -122.115254, lat 37.466055, the creek's mouth at San Francisco Bay near the Palo Alto/East Palo Alto boundary; corrects prior file coordinates (-122.1508, 37.4295), which were off by ~5.1 km from this GNIS-recorded point.

parameters.note: San Francisquito Creek and all its tributaries in Santa Clara and San Mateo counties are closed to all fishing year-round; this stream supports federally threatened Central California Coast steelhead.

regulations.humanSummary: Closed to all fishing all year
regulations.verbatimText: Closed to all fishing all year.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
